summary: 6-Item Route/API Cleanup Audit - All features verified and working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Fixed additional /dashboard/ and /partner/fulfillment references found in production_progress_routes.py, customer_notifications_routes.py, quote_engine_routes.py, email_templates_v2.py, and CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx.
updated_files: /app/backend/customer_notifications_routes.py - Fixed activity feed link from /dashboard/quotes to /account/quotes
/app/backend/email_templates_v2.py - Fixed all email links from /dashboard/ to /account/
/app/frontend/src/layouts/CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx - Fixed all sidebar nav links from /dashboard/ to /account/
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6-Item Route/API Cleanup Audit fully tested and verified. All features working: 1) Customer invoice payer_name returned by API with priority chain (invoice.payer_name → proof payer_name → billing.invoice_client_name → customer_name). 2) Vendor notification links replaced from /partner/fulfillment to /partner/orders. 3) PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx physically deleted. 4) /account/* is the only customer shell - /dashboard/* redirects to /account/*. 5) Only one admin payments page (PaymentsQueuePage) is active at /admin/payments. 6) Password show/hide toggle on LoginPageV2.jsx works correctly with data-testid='toggle-password-btn'. Additional fixes applied: Updated remaining /dashboard/ references in backend notification services and email templates to use /account/. Updated CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx sidebar links to use /account/*.

customer_invoice_payer_name.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name field with priority chain. Customer invoice table shows PAYER column.

vendor_notification_links.details: All notification links updated from /partner/fulfillment to /partner/orders. Verified via API tests.

partner_fulfillment_page_deleted.details: PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx no longer exists. /partner/fulfillment redirects to /partner/orders.

account_customer_shell.details: /account/* is the only customer shell. /dashboard/* redirects to /account/*. All sidebar links point to /account/*.

admin_payments_page.details: Only PaymentsQueuePage is active at /admin/payments. Shows Date, Invoice, Customer, Payer, Paid, Invoice Total, Mode, Status columns.

password_toggle.details: LoginPageV2.jsx has password show/hide toggle with data-testid='toggle-password-btn'. Clicking toggles input type between 'password' and 'text'.

customer_login_redirect.details: Customer login redirects to /account (not /dashboard). getDashboardPath('customer') returns '/account'.

sign_out_in_profile_dropdown.details: Sign Out is in profile dropdown (top-right), NOT in sidebar for all roles (Customer, Admin, Partner).

customer_timeline_labels.details: Customer orders show customer-safe timeline labels: Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed.

vendor_orders_privacy.details: Vendor orders table does NOT show customer name. Shows: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority.

additional_fixes_applied.customer_notifications_routes.py: Fixed activity feed link from /dashboard/quotes to /account/quotes
additional_fixes_applied.quote_engine_routes.py: Fixed notification target_url from /dashboard/quotes and /dashboard/invoices to /account/quotes and /account/invoices
additional_fixes_applied.email_templates_v2.py: Fixed all email CTA links from /dashboard/* to /account/*
additional_fixes_applied.CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx: Fixed sidebar nav links and profile dropdown menu links from /dashboard/* to /account/*
